If you live in the Penistone and Stocksbridge area and have an issue that you care about or a problem that needs addressing, please let me know. Get in touch with me > Check if Marie is your MP > Latest News View all news Marie Tidball MP welcomes new plans to lower energy bills and improve energy security Marie Tidball, Member of Parliament for Penistone and Stocksbridge, has welcomed new reforms from the government to lowe… 1 May 2026 MPs strengthen law on hate crimes following campaign backed by Marie Tidball MP MPs have voted to introduce tougher sentences for hate crimes committed against disabled and LGBT+ people by making the… 30 Apr 2026 Local MP welcomes new national plan to overhaul women’s healthcare Marie Tidball, Member of Parliament for Penistone and Stocksbridge, welcomed the Government’s Renewed Women’s Health Str… 24 Apr 2026 Marie Tidball MP marks Limb Loss and Limb Difference Awareness Month in Parliament with Alliance charities for the first time in a decade Marie Tidball, Member of Parliament for Penistone and Stocksbridge, welcomed the Limb Loss and Limb Difference Alliance… 21 Apr 2026 FROM OUR COMMUNITIES, FOR OUR COMMUNITIES Meet Marie Tidball MP I live in our constituency, and I am the first person in 100 years to grow up in Penistone and Stocksbridge and become its Member of Parliament. I grew up in Penistone, and lived in Stocksbridge in my late teens, opposite the steelworks. My parents and our communities taught me my core values – fairness, equality and community Learn more about me My priorities to you As your Member of Parliament, I'm working hard to give back to the place that nurtured me growing up, to enable local people to fulfil their potential. Read more about my priorities > Need to get in touch? If you have an issue in the Penistone and Stocksbridge area that you care about or a problem that needs addressing, please let me know. Get Support > Check if Marie is your MP > NEWSLETTER Get the latest Subscribe to monthly updates from Marie Tidball MP By subscribing, you agree to Substack's terms of use, privacy policy, and information collection notice, and Marie Tidball MP’s privacy policy. pages.title: About Marie Tidball MP
pages.meta_description: Marie Tidball MP is the first person in a hundred years to grow up in Penistone and Stocksbridge and become its Member of Parliament.
pages.text_excerpt: About Marie Tidball MP Skip to content Home About Marie News Priorities Get in touch > Newsletter Toggle menu Marie Tidball MP Marie’s Story Marie Tidball MP is the first person in over one hundred years to grow up in Penistone and Stocksbridge and become its Member of Parliament. "There's no such thing as can't" When I was born, the room in Barnsley Hospital was filled with flowers from friends and family. No-one knew how long I’d live for or what operations I might need. I missed three years of school as a child because of critical surgeries I needed to my legs, but thanks to the NHS care I received at Barnsley and Sheffield Hospitals, I survived and gained the ability to walk. After publicly funded healthcare saved my life, publicly funded education helped me follow my dreams. As a SEND-statemented child, the fantastic support from teachers and teaching support staff at my local state schools increased my confidence, and meant I was able to go onto fulfil my ambitions. Growing up, my parents taught me that there's no such word as can’t, and the importance of serving others. My state education at Penistone Grammar School, with support from Barnsley Council, enabled me to achieve a place at Oxford, where I studied law, then a masters and doctorate in Criminology. I have used my legal expertise to fight for those disadvantaged by the criminal justice system, especially autistic defendants. I know the difference that world-class public services make to people’s life chances because I’ve lived it. That experience gave me the fire to do what it takes to get things right, and get things done, no matter how difficult it might be. As your MP, I am working to give back to the communities that nurtured me growing up, to ensure everyone in our constituency can fulfil their potential. Award-winning campaigner My values have been central to my award-winning campaigns as a nationally renowned disability rights activist, legal researcher, an experienced Labour Councillor and Cabinet member. As a cabinet member and a local councillor, I spent a decade fighting Tory cuts as nationally renowned disability rights activist. When the Conservative county council cut every penny of children’s centre funding, I worked with residents to raise £54,000 to save a local children’s centre. When that same council threatened to axe home to school transport for young people with special educational needs and disabilities, I mounted a campaign with local parents to Save SEND Transport. We were successful and the decision was overturned. When Covid hit, I co-ordinated our local response, by bringing together council workers, charities and volunteers to set up street champions and local response hubs, that helped hundreds of residents cope with emergency needs like food parcels and prescription deliveries From our communities, for our communities. As Member of Parliament for Penistone and Stocksbridge, I represent the same community I grew up in, the first MP for the area in one hundred years to have done so. I know what matters to my constituents, because growing up and living here, their concerns are the same as mine. This place is special to me – it’s where my roots are, where my family live and where we are bringing up our daughter. That’s why I am focussing on the things that ensure that people growing up and growing old here can fulfil their potential: good local NHS services, well connected public transport, good, SEND-inclusive education, securing Stocksbridge Speciality Steels, enabling our high streets to thrive, and good quality affordable housing. As your Member of Parliament, I am working with you to ensure nobody is left behind across our communities. Get updates from Marie Tidball MP Subscribe to Marie's newsletter > Promoted by and on behalf of Marie Tidball at P&S Labour, P.O. Box 825, Barnsley, S73 3DU Privacy Policy Subscribe to receive updates and news directly to your inbox. Marie on Social Media Facebook Twitter Instag

pages.title: Marie’s Priorities To You
pages.meta_description: I'm working hard to enable local people to fulfil their potential.
headings: h3: Roles I hold as your MP
pages.text_excerpt: Marie’s Priorities To You Skip to content Home About Marie News Priorities Get in touch > Newsletter Toggle menu Marie Tidball MP My priorities to you As your Member of Parliament, I am working hard to give back to the place that nurtured me growing up, to enable local people to fulfil their potential. Tackling the Cost of Living Tackling poor water quality and water bosses' bonuses Good quality, affordable housing NHS Fit for the Future Improving community healthcare Access to NHS dentistry Improving the safety of maternity care for disabled women Securing Safer Communities Putting thousands more neighbourhood police and PSCOs back on the beat Tackling rural crime Removing the presumption of contact in family courts Improving local flooding prevention and extreme weather response Forging Thriving Towns and High Streets Securing the future of Stocksbridge Speciality Steels Supporting small businesses Championing local banking Connecting Our Communities Bringing buses back into public control Upgrading the Penistone Line Securing a tram train extension to Stocksbridge, via Oughtibridge, Wharncliffe Side, and Deepcar Improving and creating safe active travel Breaking Down Barriers to Opportunity Improving SEND education Supporting local skills pathways Roles I hold as your MP Co-Chair, Stocksbridge Towns Fund Board Co-Chair, Disability Parliamentary Labour Party Chair, Members Accessibility Group Parliamentary Private Secretary (PPS) to the Department for Business and Trade Promoted by and on behalf of Marie Tidball at P&S Labour, P.O. Box 825, Barnsley, S73 3DU Privacy Policy Subscribe to receive updates and news directly to your inbox. Marie on Social Media Facebook Twitter Instagram TikTok YouTube
